app.name: BRUV
enrol.title: Pair this device
enrol.subtitle: Open BRUV on your desktop, generate a bootstrap token, and paste it below. The token is single-use and expires shortly after.
enrol.field_device_name_hint: Optional. Helps identify this device on the server.
browse.empty: No brands yet. Tap + to add one.
browse.delete_brand_body: Every stream, project, and pinned card under this brand will go with it. This can't be undone.
browse.delete_stream_body: Every project and pinned card under this stream will go with it. This can't be undone.
browse.delete_project_body: All categories and pinned cards in this project will be removed. This can't be undone.
inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.empty_body: Nothing waiting to be triaged. Capture an idea and it'll land here.
inbox.long_press_hint: Long-press a card to select multiple
inbox.recent_empty_body: Edit or create a card to see it land here.
inbox.bulk_delete_body: These cards will be removed from every project they're pinned to. This can't be undone.
project.empty_body: Categories define the workflow stages of this project. Tap + to add one.
project.delete_category_body: Cards pinned to this category will be unpinned (the cards themselves stay). This can't be undone.
project.cant_delete_last: Can't delete the last category — a project needs at least one.
project.mode_single_hint: One category open at a time. Tap to switch to multi-expand.
project.mode_multi_hint: Open multiple categories at once. Tap to switch to single-expand.
card.refresh_blocks_body: Apply this card type's block layout? Existing field values are preserved where keys match.
card.no_blocks: This card has no blocks yet.
card.delete_confirm_body: "{title}" will be removed from every project it's pinned to. This can't be undone.
pin_picker.title: Pin to category
pin_picker.subtitle: Pick a category to pin this card to. You can pin to multiple places.
pin_picker.no_categories: This project has no categories yet.
capture.title: Quick capture
capture.paste_unsupported: Clipboard isn't available in this browser. Long-press to paste manually.
capture.paste_failed: Couldn't read the clipboard. Long-press in the field to paste manually.
share.title: Share to BRUV
share.intro: Edit before saving, or just tap Save — this lands as a card in your Inbox.
block.unsupported_on_mobile: This block type ({type}) isn't editable on mobile yet — view on desktop.
block.delete_body: "{name}" will be removed from this card. Other fields and content stay. This can't be undone.
block.mode_single_hint: One block open at a time. Tap to switch to multi-expand.
block.mode_multi_hint: Open multiple blocks at once. Tap to switch to single-expand.
repo_picker.title: Choose a vault
repo_picker.subtitle: Pick a vault to work with — you can switch later from Settings.
repo_picker.empty_body: The server you paired with has no vaults registered, or all of them are disabled. Open BRUV on your desktop and add a vault, then come back.
repo_picker.err_load: Could not load vaults from the server.
repo_picker.duplicate_ids: Two vaults below share the same internal ID. The server can't tell them apart, so picking either lands on the same vault. Fix repos.json (change one entry's id) or remove the duplicate.
chat.title: Chat
chat.empty: Start a conversation. Ask about the card, request edits, or just think out loud.
chat.empty_project: Start a conversation about this project. Ask BRUV to organise things, propose pins, or summarise.
chat.clear_confirm: Clear this chat history? Past messages can't be recovered.
chat.not_configured: Chat needs an LLM account. Open BRUV on desktop to set one up under Settings → AI.
chat.mode_edit_hint: BRUV will apply edits directly. Tap to switch to Suggest.
chat.mode_suggest_hint: BRUV proposes edits — you approve before they apply. Tap to switch to Chat.
chat.mode_chat_hint: Conversation only — no card edits. Tap to switch to Edit.
chat.context_all_hint: Send full card content for every card in the project.
chat.context_metadata_hint: Send only card titles — cheaper, less detailed answers.
chat.context_none_hint: Don't send any card content. BRUV only sees the project structure.
settings.title: Settings
settings.push_on_sub: You'll be pinged when an agent or due-date triggers.
settings.push_off_sub: Get notified when something happens, even when BRUV isn't open.
settings.push_unsupported: Push notifications aren't supported on this device.
settings.push_denied: Notification permission was denied. Re-enable in your phone's app settings.
settings.switch_repo_sub: Pick a different repository on this server
settings.unpair_sub: Remove this device from the server
settings.unpair_confirm_body: You'll need to scan a fresh QR or paste a bootstrap token to pair again. Your vault data is untouched.
activity.title: Activity
activity.empty: No activity yet. Create or edit a card to start the log.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty: No notifications yet. Agent pings and due-date alerts show up here.
notifications.clear_confirm: Remove every notification from this list? This can't be undone.
search.title: Search
search.hint: Search by title, type, or tag.
comments.title: Comments
attachment.title: Attachments
not_found.title: Not found
